tender.title: Dynamic Purchasing System - Temporary Accommodation
tender.description:
The London Borough of Hillingdon has awarded to join a formal Dynamic Purchasing System (DPS), to provide temporary accommodation for homeless households.

The values within this notice are for a 5+2 year period from February 2022 and this notice is published in December 2023 . The Council intends to award to providers via mini-competitions as detailed in the ITT.

The Council invites new temporary accommodation landlords to join the DPS - www.capitalesourcing.com

Additional information: 
The full suite of tender documents are available via the London Borough of Hillingdon's tender portal www.capitalesourcing.com
Please register on the above portal where the tender documents for this project can be accessed.  

The Council invites new temporary accommodation landlords to join the DPS - www.capitalesourcing.com

address.streetAddress: Hillingdon Council, Civic Centre, High Street

tender.title: TC160 - North West Supported Accommodation (Young People) Flexible Purchasing System (FPS)
tender.description:
Placements North West (PNW) is commissioned by a the 23 North West local authorities to coordinate and manage collaborative procurement in relation to placements for children and young people across those authorities. \r
\r
Currently it has been agreed there will be four lots: \r
•	Group Living\r
•	Accommodation with Floating Support\r
•	Floating Support\r
•	Supported Lodgings

tender.title: Housing and Homelessness and Rough Sleeping Strategies for Arun District Council
tender.description:
Arun District Council is seeking proposals from qualified and experienced organisations for the development of two strategies. A housing strategy and a homelessness and rough sleeping strategy.

The Housing Strategy should set out our vision for housing in Arun from 2024 to 2028 and provide a clear and robust plan for meeting the housing needs of the local community, taking into account the changing demographic and economic circumstances of the area. 
The Homelessness and Rough Sleeping Strategy should provide a clear direction for the Council and its partners in tackling homelessness and rough sleeping in the district from 2024 to 2028.

The authority conducted a mini-competition via the ESPO Consultancy services Framework (664-21) Lot 8E.

tender.title: Housing Related Support - Outreach - AWARD
tender.description:
Housing Related Support - Outreach is intended to support individuals and families living in Worcestershire with difficulties which may have resulted in or may result in homelessness, and to provide support to gain the necessary skills to maintain their own tenancy.
      
      WCF does not envisage any service provider to work in isolation with the young people. WCF commit to working with the service provider(s) to meet their wider needs through accessing community resources and utilising WCF's wider partnerships and resources to improve outcomes for young people and will always aspire to work with.
      
      The primary function of the service provider(s) is to equip young people with the relevant skills necessary to sustain a current tenancy, access a tenancy in the future and become independently competent in this area as far as practicable.
      
      If you wish to view the documents for this opportunity please click `Express Interest`. 
      
      Following this, if you wish to apply for this opportunity please click `Opt in` which will then enable you to view and complete the Standard Questionnaire and upload the relevant documents.
      
      After uploading all required documents and completing the questionnaire(s) please remember to press the `Submit your Return` button at the bottom of the page.  
      
      Suppliers will receive a system generated email to confirm successful submission of their return.
      
      Any questions or clarification should be conducted via `Correspondence` through this portal.
